// A/C SAIL / 75,000 MT (+)10% (-)5% OO COKING COAL IN BULK / EX USA TO ECI //
DATE 08TH JAN 2026
REF :IBC/PB/001
HAVE FOLL TO FIX:
ACCT SAIL
CARGO AND QUANTITY
: 75,000 MT 10% MOLOO COKING COAL IN BULK
LAYDAYS
: 05TH TO 14TH FEB’2026
LOADPORT:
1 / 2 SB 1 SP HPCT/DBCT/NQXT, AUSTRALIA, AT CHARTERS OPTION
LOADRATE:
35,000 MT / 40,000 MT/ 45000 MT AT CHARTERS OPTION PWWD SHINC
OTHERWISE AS PER CP FORMAT.
DISCHARGEPORT:
1 / 2 SB/SA 1 SP GANGAVARAM PORT (GPL) OR VISAKHAPATNAM PORT (VPT) AT CHARTERER (NSL)’S OPTION.
DISCHARGE RATE  :
GANGAVARAM (GPL): 40,000 MT SHINC
VIZAG:
20,000 MT PWWD SHINC
(NOTE: SHINC PROVISION TO BE APPLICABLE AFTER COMMENCEMENT OF LAYTIME).
DEMURRAGE/DESPATCH:
THE CEILING DEMURRAGE RATE FOR THIS ENQUIRY SHALL BE USD 25,000 PER DAY / HD. HOWEVER, BIDDERS CAN QUOTE BELOW THE CEILING RATE.
FREIGHT :
THE FREIGHT RATE TO BE QUOTED BASIS ONE LOAD PORT (HPCT/DBCT/NQXT), / ONE DISCHARGE PORT (GANGAVARAM PORT) I.E. (1/1) BASIS WITH LOAD RATE OF 35,000 METRIC TONS/WWD & WITH DISCHARGE RATE OF 40000 METRIC TONS/WWD.
2.50 ADCOM PLUS 1.25% TO INTERBULK
REPLY BY 1200 HOURS IST FRIDAY I.E 09TH JAN 2026
+ + + +
